issues.description: Target should be limited to 1 character max. Current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' allows selecting multiple. Should use 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with maxTargets:1 or equivalent constraint.

Condition 'HasRestingDon' with count:1 is incorrect. Effect requires [DON!! x1] as cost/payment, not a board state condition. Should use cost-based trigger or remove condition entirely if DON cost is represented separately.
